name: cutout-rectangle-florida
description: Use a cutout rectangle to reveal the base imagery through an overlay over Florida.
prompt: Create a CesiumJS viewer centered on Florida and the northern Caribbean. Add a dark Earth at Night overlay above the default base imagery, then cut a rectangular hole over the Florida peninsula so the normal base imagery shows through in that area while the surrounding region still shows the darker overlay.
expected_behaviors: Uses Rectangle.fromDegrees to define a cutout
Assigns cutoutRectangle to the overlay layer
visual_expectations: The region around Florida should appear darker due to the overlay, but the peninsula itself should be visibly cut out, revealing the base imagery beneath.
